comment: Region (d) part 2: the coal mine, from the squeaky door to the Machine Room. Mechanics per the ZIL source: the vampire bat carries anyone not holding garlic away into the mine (the original picks a random drop room; ours is a fixed one, a documented relaxation), the gas room detonates on any carried open flame (the dynamic `flame` property maintained by region 05/06 rules; the lamp is electric and safe), the four mine rooms are all alike (one shared image seed, like the maze), the Timber/Drafty crack passes only the empty-handed, and the basket dumbwaiter is the original's two-object trick: the real container plus a far-end dummy so the chain can be worked from either end. The machine turns coal into a diamond behind a closed lid and a screwdriver (the diamond is authored offstage and moved in, so the treasure ledger stays static); feeding it anything else is ignored rather than slagged (documented relaxation). Drafty Room carries the 13-point bonus.

rooms.title: Mine Entrance
rooms.seed: the mouth of an old coal mine, timber props, a squeak of wings somewhere within
rooms.description: You are standing at the entrance of what might have been a coal mine. The shaft enters the west wall, and there is another exit on the south end of the room.

rooms.title: Squeaky Room
rooms.seed: a small stone room, strange squeaking beyond the north passage
rooms.description: You are in a small room. Strange squeaky sounds may be heard coming from the passage at the north end. You may also escape to the east.

rooms.title: Bat Room
rooms.seed: a small cave room, an exquisite jade figurine below a ceiling occupied by one large bat
rooms.description: You are in a small room which has doors only to the east and south.

do.text:
A large vampire bat, hanging from the ceiling, swoops down at you!

    Fweep!
    Fweep!
    Fweep!

The bat grabs you by the scruff of your neck and lifts you away....
In the corner of the room on the ceiling is a large vampire bat who is obviously deranged and holding his nose.

rooms.title: Shaft Room
rooms.seed: a large chamber over a narrow black shaft, iron framework and a heavy chain into the dark
rooms.description: This is a large room, in the middle of which is a small shaft descending through the floor into darkness below. To the west and the north are exits from this room. Constructed over the top of the shaft is a metal framework to which a heavy iron chain is attached.

down.text: You wouldn't fit, and you would regret succeeding.

rooms.title: Smelly Room
rooms.seed: a small nondescript room already thick with a gas smell rising from below
rooms.description: This is a small non-descript room. However, from the direction of a small descending staircase a foul odor can be detected. To the south is a narrow tunnel.

rooms.title: Gas Room
rooms.seed: a small chamber heavy with the smell of coal gas, a sapphire bracelet glinting on the floor
rooms.description: This is a small room which smells strongly of coal gas. There is a short climb up some stairs and a narrow tunnel leading east.

do.text:
Oh dear. It appears that the smell in this room was coal gas, and you appear to have brought an open flame to discuss it with.

    ** BOOOOOOOOOOOM **

rooms.title: Coal Mine
rooms.seed: a non-descript gallery of the old coal mine, every direction alike
rooms.description: This is a non-descript part of a coal mine.

rooms.title: Coal Mine
rooms.seed: a non-descript gallery of the old coal mine, every direction alike
rooms.description: This is a non-descript part of a coal mine.

rooms.title: Coal Mine
rooms.seed: a non-descript gallery of the old coal mine, every direction alike
rooms.description: This is a non-descript part of a coal mine.

rooms.title: Coal Mine
rooms.seed: a non-descript gallery of the old coal mine, every direction alike
rooms.description: This is a non-descript part of a coal mine.

rooms.title: Ladder Top
rooms.seed: a narrow passage broken by the top of a rickety wooden ladder
rooms.description: This is a very small room. In the corner is a rickety wooden ladder, leading downward. It might be safe to descend. There is also a staircase leading upward.

rooms.title: Ladder Bottom
rooms.seed: the foot of a rickety ladder in a rough gallery, passages south and west
rooms.description: This is a rather wide room. On one side is the bottom of a narrow wooden ladder. To the west and the south are passages leaving the room.

rooms.title: Dead End
rooms.seed: a dead end in the mine, a small pile of coal glinting dully
rooms.description: You have come to a dead end in the mine.

rooms.title: Timber Room
rooms.seed: a long narrow passage cluttered with broken timbers, a very narrow crack leading west
rooms.description: This is a long and narrow passage, which is cluttered with broken timbers. A wide passage comes from the east, and a very narrow passage leads west.

west.blocked_text: You cannot fit through this passage with that load.

rooms.title: Drafty Room
rooms.seed: a small drafty chamber at the bottom of the long shaft, the iron chain descending into it
rooms.description: This is a small drafty room in which is the bottom of a long shaft. To the south is a passageway and to the east a very narrow passage. In the shaft can be seen a heavy iron chain.

out.blocked_text: You cannot fit through this passage with that load.

east.blocked_text: You cannot fit through this passage with that load.

rooms.title: Machine Room
rooms.seed: a cool room dominated by one machine shaped suspiciously like a clothes dryer, a switch beside its lid
rooms.description: This is a large, cold room whose sole exit is to the north. In one corner there is a machine which is reminiscent of a clothes dryer. On its face is a switch which is labelled in a dialect of Dwarvish, though fortunately the usage is obvious: it takes a tool, not a finger.

things.name: vampire bat
things.seed: a large vampire bat of unsound mind, hanging from the ceiling

properties.examined_text: The bat hangs from the ceiling with the deranged composure of a creature that has never once been contradicted. It is keeping a respectful distance from your garlic.

do.text: You can't reach him; he's on the ceiling.
You can't reach him; he's on the ceiling.

things.name: jade figurine
things.seed: an exquisite jade figurine, small enough to pocket, fine enough to regret pocketing

things.name: sapphire-encrusted bracelet
things.seed: a bracelet crusted with sapphires, abandoned in a hurry by someone sensible

things.name: small pile of coal
things.seed: a small pile of honest coal, patient about its future

things.name: basket
things.seed: a sturdy basket hung from the iron chain, a dumbwaiter for miners

do.text: The cage is securely fastened to the iron chain.
The basket is already at the top of the chain.
The basket is raised to the top of the shaft.
The basket is already at the bottom of the chain.
The basket is lowered to the bottom of the shaft.

things.name: basket
things.seed: the far end of the dumbwaiter chain, the basket itself away at the other end

properties.examined_text: The basket is at the other end of the chain.

do.text: The basket is at the other end of the chain.
The basket is at the other end of the chain.
The basket is raised to the top of the shaft.
The basket is already at the top of the chain.
The basket is lowered to the bottom of the shaft.
The basket is already at the bottom of the chain.

things.name: broken timber
things.seed: a broken length of mine timber, heavy and profoundly useless

things.name: machine
things.seed: a machine reminiscent of a clothes dryer, lid on top, an air of dwarvish patents about it

properties.open_text: The lid opens, revealing the machine's hopper: a scorched chamber that has clearly held stranger cargo than yours.

things.name: switch
things.seed: a stubby switch beside the machine's lid, slotted for a tool

do.text: The machine gives an offended click. It will not perform with its lid open.
The machine comes to life (figuratively) with a dazzling display of colored lights and bizarre noises. After a few moments, the excitement abates.
The machine shudders through its cycle with nothing to work on, and settles back into disappointment.
The switch wants a flat blade and some conviction; fingers are neither.

things.name: huge diamond
things.seed: a huge diamond, all its coal years behind it
